response.justification: While Bogdan is a senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience and demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and systems thinking, he lacks the core technical foundation required for this role. His career trajectory is entirely web, backend, and mobile development—he has no SoC/IP modeling, no GPU architecture experience, no hardware-software co-design background, and no AI accelerator optimization work. The gap between full-stack software development and specialized hardware performance architecture for AI accelerators is too fundamental to bridge in this role.
strengths: Principal/Staff-level seniority with 15+ years of engineering experience, meeting education and experience requirements
Demonstrated systems thinking through microservices, low-latency optimization, and real-time infrastructure work at scale
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks) and ability to work across multiple languages and domains
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture design—a core required skill for this role
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerator design, or deep learning workload optimization; career is entirely web and backend focused
Lacks all three preferred qualifications: SIMD/MIMD architecture, DNN training/inference optimization, and GPU architecture analysis

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP and hardware modeling expertise
